record.text: The fix is to add boundaries and rules. Give the AI explicit limits for each phase of work. Tell it to finish one locked task before moving to the next. State exact output formats, forbidden shortcuts, and word limits that keep it on track. Constraints act like lanes on a highway. Without them […]
record.bridgyOriginalText: The fix is to add boundaries and rules. Give the AI explicit limits for each phase of work. Tell it to finish one locked task before moving to the next. State exact output formats, forbidden shortcuts, and word limits that keep it on track. Constraints act like lanes on a highway. Without them your prompt spreads into every direction and arrives nowhere useful. (2/4)

images.alt:
A weathered farmhouse stands alone in the middle distance, surrounded by a cold, mist-covered landscape that feels abandoned and silent. Warm golden light spills from several windows, creating a striking contrast against the dark, storm-filled sky overhead. Heavy clouds gather above the roof, their swirling shapes suggesting an approaching tempest while soft fog blankets the ground around the house. A solitary child stands motionless on the front porch, facing outward as if waiting for someone or something to arrive. In the foreground, dominating the lower edge of the composition, lies a pair of worn ruby-red shoes resting on muddy, waterlogged earth. Their vivid crimson color is the brightest element in the scene, drawing the eye immediately before leading it toward the illuminated house beyond. Sparse dead grasses emerge from the marshy ground, and reflections shimmer faintly in shallow pools of water. The muted palette of grays, blues, and blackened earth heightens the eerie atmosphere, while the glowing windows and brilliant red shoes suggest a haunting connection between innocence, memory, and a place that may no longer be safe to call home.
Keywords:
haunted house, ruby slippers, child, storm, fog, abandoned farmhouse, dark fantasy, eerie, muddy landscape, glowing windows, cinematic, solitude

「おはようございます🌞
最近、カフェに来るお客さんで遅い時間の朝食を注文する人が増えてきた気がするので、朝食メニューも増やしたいな～と思ってるんです。

カフェの定番の朝食メニューは大体網羅しちゃってるので、パンやご飯とは違った食感で映えるメニューにしたいかなって🎵

色々考えた結果、台湾の『シェントウジャン』を出してみようと思うんですけどどうですかね❓

OKですか❓
じゃあ早速、こちらになりま～す✨
（ラー油を入れ過ぎたのは内緒です🤭💕）」

【シェントウジャン】
温かい豆乳にお酢を加えてトロトロに固めた台湾の定番朝食スープです。(続きはALT参照)

images.alt:
お酢の酸味と豆乳のまろやかさに、ラー油のピリ辛アクセントが効いた、ホッとするやさしい味わいが魅力です。
豆乳のクリーミーなコクとお酢のさっぱりとした酸味が絶妙にマッチします。食べる前にスプーンで全体を軽く混ぜ合わせることで、さまざまな具材の旨味がスープに溶け出し、一口ごとに違った食感や風味を楽しめます。
